rationale: Educ. Code §34.009 governs school bus leasing and acquisition contracts. It has no relation to Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amounts. No conflict exists.
quote: As an alternative to purchasing a school bus, a board of county school trustees or school district board of trustees may contract with any person for use, acquisition, or lease with option to purchase of a school bus
_note: Rule text concerns school bus contracts only; no overlap with homestead exemption provisions.
